name: construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 permit applications/month, delays in permit application submissions cause project hold-ups. We automate the submission process instead of manual submission of permit applications.
problem_solved: Delays in permit application submissions lead to project hold-ups.
